summary: Iteration 6 fresh-clone backend verification for dynabook/RealFlow. Wrote a new focused smoke suite (test_iteration6_clone_smoke.py) covering all endpoints called out in the review request: diagnostics/health, diagnostics/hardware-profile, admin/login (success+failure), license/config (public), admin/license/list (auth-gated + JWT), auth/register, auth/login (success + bad pw + duplicate), and /api/links (auth-gated + JWT after admin approval with features.links=true). 12/12 new tests pass. Also re-ran the iter-5 regression suite (test_iteration5_license_delete_cleanup.py) against the new clone — 21/21 pass. Total 33/33. Backend is healthy end-to-end on the public preview URL https://bookdyna-sync.preview.emergentagent.com. MongoDB reachable, admin JWT issuance works, license module behaves correctly (auth required where expected), user signup -> admin-approve -> login -> protected resource flow works.

minor.issue: Response uses 'recommended_tier' instead of canonical 'tier'/'hardware_tier'. Carried over from iter-4/5 follow-ups. Not a functional bug; just an API-shape inconsistency that easily trips smoke tests.

action_items: (P3, carried) server.py is still ~13.6k lines — continue the license_module.py extraction pattern for auth, links, cpi, rut modules.
(P3, carried) Consider exposing canonical 'tier' field at the top level of /api/diagnostics/hardware-profile (alongside 'recommended_tier') so external smoke tests don't drift.
(P3, carried) Consider adding POST /api/license/heartbeat as an alias of /api/license/validate so the public docs term matches the endpoint name.
critical_code_review_comments: All previously-flagged P0 safety guardrails on license bulk-delete and cleanup remain intact in this fresh clone (empty bulk-delete -> 400; active licenses untouched by cleanup; double-delete -> 404 — all verified by re-running iter-5).
Admin login correctly rejects wrong password (returns 401/403, not 500) — no information leak.
Auth/register correctly rejects duplicate emails (4xx, not 500).
/api/links and /api/admin/license/list both correctly require JWT (401/403 without Authorization header).
Health endpoint reports playwright rev 1148 warn + gsheet_sa warn as documented in the request — these are non-blocking and main agent already acknowledged.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@realflow.local / admin123. New TEST_clone_<uuid8>@example.com users created during register/login test; user is approved via PUT /api/admin/users/{id} with status=active + features.links=true.
seed_data_creation: Each run creates one TEST_clone_<uuid8>@example.com user in db.users (left in place; same convention as iter-5).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Re-run with: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://bookdyna-sync.preview.emergentagent.com pytest /app/backend/tests/test_iteration6_clone_smoke.py /app/backend/tests/test_iteration5_license_delete_cleanup.py -v. Gotchas (still valid): (1) admin_login response token key is 'access_token' (also accept 'token'). (2) hardware-profile uses 'recommended_tier' under root + 'detected.cpu_cores'/'detected.total_ram_gb'. (3) health endpoint mongo status path is checks.mongodb.status. (4) /api/links requires features.links=true on user, set via PUT /api/admin/users/{id}. (5) /api/admin/license/issue uses query params email+days, not body.
